Contract: Consumes the tracker container image naglight:local — NagLight owns the Dockerfile/build (D1/WI-10.4); resolved by scripts/ensure-local-images.sh (present -> sibling ../NagLight build -> declared TRACKER_PUBLIC_IMAGE).

oauth2-proxy forwards verified identity headers (X-Forwarded-Email / X-Forwarded-User, X-Auth-Request-*) to the tracker's trusted-header multi-user mode (D3, NagLight WI-10.5); safe ONLY because the tracker port is never host-published (SR-004).

POST /api/feed with JSON {check,ok,note}, Bearer NAGLIGHT_TOKEN (+ X-Forwarded-User for multi-user attribution) — the backup service step 6 and Uptime-Kuma push here; round-trip verified in sim (run-backup-sim.sh check 6).
